retrieved_result: Google Play Movies & TV app Google Play Movies & TV app Chromecast requires Google Play Movies & TV app version 2.6.9 or higher on Android and version 1.0.1 on i OS. To update to the latest version, please visit Google Play or the Apple App Store. Using Chromecast, you can cast movies & TV shows from the Google Play Movies & T
